channel.title: Kiwi's Blog Feed
channel.description: I wonder how many people would follow my blogs using this feed...

item.title: Project Hail Mary
item.description:
Space is scary

As you may be aware few days ago, I had a crash out over CRK's story. After all my disappointment, I decided the way to regain my hope for the future is to enjoy a story that is actually good. It had been a while the last time I went to watch a movie, so I decided to pick a movie that is well-rated. While scrolling Twitter, particularly around the time when Atermis II launched, I occasionally saw people talking about Project Hail Mary. I hadn't watched much sci-fi movies, but the topic of space always intrigued me. So yea, I went to watch it with my boyfriend.

...Continue reading

item.title: Kill Shadow Milk
item.description:
Shadow Milk fans please don't read this

Due to recent news, I decided to leave CRK, and the entire Cookie Run franchise fandom. This blog will be fueled by my full disappointment and anger at the recent plot development of CRK. If you enjoy the recent story, or is a fan of Shadow Milk, this blog will likely not be for your taste. It's a vent blog inconprehensibly ranting about Shadow Milk, using the dumb method of shitposting.

...Continue reading

item.title: Tomodachi Life on 吊你老母 (Part 6)
item.description:
Smaller updates this time

Welcome back to 吊你老母, a land of weird memes and shitposts. And this time, more fighting, more drama, and more characters.

...Continue reading

item.title: Tomodachi Life on 吊你老母 (Part 5)
item.description:
Drama, fighting, and divorce

Remember that I mentioned the lack of drama on the island. Well, I got what I asked for, and things are getting interesting. Also there's new islanders, I'll introduce them.

...Continue reading

item.title: Tomodachi Life on 吊你老母 (Part 4)
item.description:
Solar has too much rizz

Welcome to my 4th episode of my 吊你老母 island series. This time, there's more romance, more interactions, more characters, and more wacky stuff.

...Continue reading

item.title: Tomodachi Life on 吊你老母 (Part 3)
item.description:
More drama pls

Welcome back to my Tomocachi Life gameplay blog, this time more characters has been added, and more dramas ensue.

...Continue reading

item.title: Tomodachi Life on 吊你老母 (Part 2)
item.description:
Slowburn? More like Speed inferno!

Welcome to part 2 of my Tomodachi Life gameplay! Within just three days, a lot has happened on 吊你老母 (Oh yeah that's my island name BTW).

...Continue reading

item.title: Tomodachi Life: Living the Dream (Part 1)
item.description:
I'm losing sleep

On April 15, in every country, when 12 am strikes, Tomodachi Life is released. I sat down waiting for the moment, and when the timer reaches zero, I immediately opened the long-await game...

...Continue reading

item.title: The Amazing Digital Region Limited Movie
item.description:
Glitch Studio pls

So this morning I woke up, I saw the trailer for EP9, A.K.A. the final episode of The Amazing Digital Circus, was out. I watched the trailer and was quite excited (Jax, I like your writing but I can't wait for you to die), but unfortunately... There's some bad news if you are not American, Latin American, Japanese or Canadian.

...Continue reading

item.title: Wow Leeks!!111!
item.description:
The days when I would dig for one day early info

Being in various fandoms, I was an excitable fan who would go through every corners of the Internet just to get a small info on the newest updates. Even if said info is something meant to be officially released the very next day, it still brought me so much thrill.

...Continue reading
